nodes.label: AI as quick reference tool

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant for chart notes
nodes.grounding_span: if I don't know how to word a chart note the way I want to I might use it to help me get the information across

nodes.label: AI integration into hospital systems

nodes.label: AI for patient monitoring and alerts
nodes.grounding_span: a system that monitored the patients temp, breathing, vitals and can alert the care team to subtle changes

nodes.label: AI for infection control
nodes.grounding_span: an infection control AI to monitor things and complete actions to reduce spread

nodes.label: Maintaining core nursing skills
nodes.label_negative: Over-reliance on AI leading to skill loss
nodes.grounding_span: it's important to maintain that knowledge in case systems go down

nodes.label: AI improving working conditions for nurses
nodes.grounding_span: I hope it improves working conditions for nurses

nodes.label: Efficiency and competence
